cli.description: Generate a recipe and publish it (with an AI image) to Mealie.
cli.epilog:
Examples:
  mealie-tool "quick creamy tomato soup with basil"
  mealie-tool --cuisine Italian --ingredients "chicken, lemon, garlic"
  mealie-tool --cuisine Thai --name "Green curry" --dry-run
cli.help.name: Force a specific recipe name
cli.help.output_dir: Where to read style examples and write files (default: cwd)
cli.help.env_file: Path to the .env file with credentials (overrides ~/.config/Mealie-AI-Tools/.env and ./.env)
cli.help.dry_run: Generate and save the JSON only; do not touch Mealie or generate an image
cli.help.force: Upload even if a recipe with the same name already exists
cli.help.keep_files: Keep the cached files (<slug>.json and the image) after upload
cli.help.lang: UI and recipe language (e.g. no, en); overrides MEALIE_LANG
cli.help.search: Search Mealie recipes and show matches with links; can add a match's ingredients to a shopping list (instead of generating)
cli.help.retag: Walk recipes in Mealie and suggest tags for those that are missing (retag mode)
cli.help.min_tags: Process recipes with fewer than N tags (default {default})
cli.help.max_tags: Upper limit on the number of tags per recipe (default {default})
cli.help.limit: Maximum number of recipes to process in this run
cli.help.batch_size: Number of recipes per Gemini call (default {default})
cli.help.merge_tags: Find and merge very similar tags in Mealie (merge-tags mode)
cli.help.debug: Show full error detail (cause, URL, status, response body) on failure
cli.help.fill_images: Generate and upload images for recipes in Mealie that have none (fill-images mode)
cli.similarity_range: --similarity must be a number between 0 and 1.
merge.confirm: Apply {count} merge(s)? This deletes tags and cannot be undone.
merge.noninteractive: Running without a terminal and without --yes; aborting (merge-tags is destructive).
merge.delete_warn: Warning: could not delete the tag '{name}': {error}
merge.no_tag_ids: Error: Mealie exposes no tag ids on the recipes, so merging cannot be done safely. Aborting without deleting anything.
fill_images.none: No recipes are missing an image.
fill_images.noninteractive: Running without a terminal and without --yes; aborting (image generation is costly).
req.name: Desired recipe name: {value}
req.empty_error:
Error: describe the recipe you want. Provide free text and/or --cuisine / --ingredients / --name. Example:
  mealie-tool "creamy fish soup" --cuisine Norwegian
prompt.system:
You are a professional chef and recipe writer. You create complete, achievable, restaurant-quality recipes.

Rules for the response:
- Write EVERYTHING in English: name, description, ingredients and instructions.
- description: enticing and appetizing, 1-3 sentences.
- recipeCategory: one category, e.g. Dinner, Lunch, Dessert, Starter, Breakfast, Baking.
- keywords: comma-separated list of relevant search terms.
- recipeYield: number of servings, e.g. "4 servings".
- prepTime, cookTime and totalTime: ISO 8601 duration, e.g. PT15M or PT1H15M.
  totalTime must be the sum of prepTime and cookTime.
- recipeIngredient: each ingredient with amount and unit, e.g. "500 g fresh spinach".
- recipeInstructions: each step has a short, descriptive name and a clear text.
- Do not use markdown or numbering inside the text fields.
prompt.example_header: Example {i} of the desired format, style and level of detail:
prompt.multi: Now create {count} DIFFERENT recipes based on the request below. They must be clearly distinct – vary the main ingredient, twist or preparation method – not minor variants of the same dish. Give them different names. Return a JSON list of exactly {count} recipes. Do not copy the examples – use them only as a template for style and structure.
prompt.single: Now create a new recipe based on the following request. Do not copy the examples – use them only as a template for style and structure.
prompt.retag_system: You are an assistant that suggests relevant keywords (tags) for recipes. You answer only with tags, in English, as short nouns or short noun phrases. You always prefer tags from the supplied list of existing tags, and only propose new ones where no existing tag fits.
prompt.retag_instructions: For each recipe below: suggest between {min} and {max} relevant tags in total. Reuse existing tags where they fit, and propose new ones only when no existing tag covers an important theme (e.g. main ingredient, cuisine, dish type, occasion). Do not create near-duplicates of existing tags. Return a list where each item has the recipe's index and its tags.
dry_run.done: Dry run: skipped upload to Mealie and image generation.
upload.noninteractive: Non-interactive run without --yes: skipping upload. The JSON file is saved locally. Use --yes to upload to Mealie.
upload.aborted: Aborted. The JSON file is saved locally.
dup.error: Error: a recipe named {name} already exists in Mealie ({count} matches). Use --force to upload anyway.
cli.insecure_url: Warning: MEALIE_URL is not HTTPS ({url}) — the API token is sent in cleartext.
cli.http_blocked: Error: MEALIE_URL uses http:// ({url}) — the API token would be sent in cleartext. Set MEALIE_ALLOW_HTTP=1 to allow it deliberately, or use https://.
env.not_set: Error: {name} is not set. Add it to ~/.config/{config_dir}/.env (or ./.env, or pass --env-file) and try again.
gemini.timeout_not_int: Error: GEMINI_TIMEOUT must be a whole number of seconds (got {value}).
gemini.timeout_not_positive: Error: GEMINI_TIMEOUT must be a positive number of seconds (got {value}).
gemini.no_content: Error: Gemini returned no content (possibly blocked or empty). Try rephrasing the request.
gemini.schema_mismatch: Error: Gemini returned data that does not match the recipe schema: {error}
gemini.no_recipes: Error: Gemini returned no recipes. Try rephrasing the request.
gemini.no_image: Error: Gemini returned no image for {name} (possibly blocked or empty). Try again or rephrase the recipe.
models.hint_header: Model '{model}' was not found. Available models:
disclaimer.ai: Note: the recipe and image are AI-generated — verify ingredients, amounts and allergens before use.
disclaimer.retag: Note: the tag suggestions are AI-generated — review them before applying.
disclaimer.ai_recipe: AI-generated recipe — verify ingredients, amounts and allergens before use.
disclaimer.fill_images: Note: the images are AI-generated — they do not show the actual dish.
image.ok: OK: uploaded image to the recipe ({name}).
image.warn_detail: The recipe IS created in Mealie, but without an image. You can generate and upload the image manually later (do not re-run without --force, it will be stopped by the duplicate check).
cleanup.kept: Kept existing file (not created by this run): {path}
output_dir.error: Error: could not use output directory {path}: {error}
overwrite.blocked: Error: the file {path} already exists. Choose a different name (--name) or output dir (--output-dir), or pass --force to overwrite.
write.error: Error: could not write the file {path}: {error}
summary.name: Name:         {value}
category.fetch_error: Warning: could not fetch categories from Mealie: {error}
cuisine.fetch_error: Warning: could not fetch tags from Mealie: {error}
tools.fetch_error: Warning: could not fetch tools from Mealie: {error}
tools.prompt: Tools [e.g. 1,3 or 1-5 or * for all – Enter=none]:
shopping.choose_ingredients_header: Which ingredients go on the shopping list? (Enter = none)
shopping.ingredients_prompt: Pick numbers, e.g. 1,3 or 1-5 or * for all (empty = none):
shopping.no_lists: No shopping lists found in Mealie.
shopping.lists_fetch_error: Could not fetch shopping lists from Mealie: {error}
shopping.offer: Add ingredients to a shopping list?
shopping.added: Added {count} ingredient(s) to the shopping list '{list}'.
shopping.add_warn: Warning: could not add to the shopping list: {error}
shopping.added_partial: Added {added} of {total} items to the shopping list '{list}' ({failed} failed).
shopping.search_error: Error fetching the recipe or updating the shopping list: {error}
tui.form.text_ph: e.g. quick creamy tomato soup with basil
tui.empty_request: Describe the recipe you want (free text and/or cuisine / ingredients / name).
tui.shopping_ingredients_label: Ingredients for the shopping list (select, empty = none):
tui.force_checkbox: Upload even if the name exists (force)
tui.already_uploaded: Already uploaded. Generate a new recipe to upload again.
tui.log.dup_aborted: Aborted: {name} already exists ({count} matches). Go back and tick “force”.
tui.log.image_warn: Warning: image failed (the recipe IS created): {error}
tui.log.tools_warn: Warning: could not attach tools (recipe WAS created): {error}
tui.log.shopping_ok: Added {count} ingredient(s) to the shopping list '{list}'.
tui.log.shopping_warn: Warning: could not add to the shopping list: {error}
tui.app.title: Recipe generator
tui.app.no_api_key: GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY is missing from .env – generation will fail.
retag.scanned: {total} recipes total, {thin} with too few tags.
retag.batch_warn: Warning: a batch failed and was skipped: {error}
retag.no_new: No new tags proposed — only existing ones are reused.
retag.new_tags_header: New tags proposed (tick the ones to keep):
retag.new_tags_prompt: Choose numbers, e.g. 1,3 or 1-5 or * for all (empty = keep none):
retag.noninteractive: Running without a terminal and without --yes; applying only existing tags (no new ones).
retag.tag_warn: Warning: skipped the tag '{name}' (could not be created or found).
